transcription.text: I'ma be on the next level, I'ma be rockin' over that bass treble I'ma be chillin' with my mother-mother crew, I'ma be makin' all them deals you wanna do I'ma be up in them A-list flicks, doin' one-handed flips And I'ma be sippin' on drip cuz, I'ma be shakin' my hips You gon' be lickin' your lips, I'ma be takin' them pics
